    Index

    A B C D E F G H I L M N O P R S T U V 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    T

    TEXT_PRIMARY - Static variable in class util.AppColors
    Primary text colour — white.
    TEXT_SECONDARY - Static variable in class util.AppColors
    Secondary text colour — muted grey for labels and placeholders.
    timestamp - Variable in class domain.Expense
    Date and time when this expense was created.
    titleFontSize - Variable in class ui.DashboardScreen
    Font size for the screen title label.
    titleFontSize - Variable in class ui.HistoryScreen
    Font size for the screen title label.
    titleFontSize - Variable in class ui.SetupScreen
    Font size for the screen title label.
    titleLabel - Variable in class ui.HistoryScreen
    Title label at the top of the screen.
    todayDate - Variable in class ui.ExpenseLoggingScreen
    Today's date, used to pre-fill the transaction date field.
    todayDateField - Variable in class ui.ExpenseLoggingScreen
    Read-only field showing today's date as the transaction date.
    todayDateLabel - Variable in class ui.ExpenseLoggingScreen
    Label for the transaction date field.
    toString() - Method in class domain.Category
    Returns the category name, used by Swing combo boxes and list renderers.
    totalAllowance - Variable in class domain.BudgetCycle
    Total money allocated for this cycle in EGP.
    totalSpent - Variable in class domain.BudgetCycle
    Running total of all expenses logged in this cycle.
    totalSpentLabel - Variable in class ui.DashboardScreen
    Label displaying the total amount spent in the current cycle.
    transactionTable - Variable in class ui.HistoryScreen
    Table showing all expense transactions.
    transactionTableModel - Variable in class ui.HistoryScreen
    Backing model for the transaction table.
